# dgVoodoo2 v2.87.3

Author: Dege  
Copyright (c) 2013-2026

Source release: [dgVoodoo2 v2.87.3](https://github.com/dege-diosg/dgVoodoo2/releases/tag/v2.87.3)

The following files are included for the Against Rome game mod integration:

- `D3D8.dll` from `MS/x86/D3D8.dll`
- `DDraw.dll` from `MS/x86/DDraw.dll`
- `dgVoodooCpl.exe`
- `dgVoodoo.conf`

SHA-256 values verified against the official v2.87.3 release archive:

| File | SHA-256 |
|---|---|
| `D3D8.dll` | `2FE0314195D0CAF2C72C5496352C4235858B0F104A3A2B0D88832F15F76FAF57` |
| `DDraw.dll` | `D977BDDD66BE64B23C60001D88F779E784E0FB48694147103AC57CF008247282` |
| `dgVoodooCpl.exe` | `EBECC6DC72F9A43146EC5954564A47AC68F9DA51FA692CFC64FCE553DD1E9A6D` |
| `dgVoodoo.conf` | `FD2C19EA2B7C1BD3AE38D86571AC2484E0681294F0783CF5197AD349495A35BD` |

The author's redistribution terms permit games and game mods to ship individual
dgVoodoo files. Standalone redistribution must use the complete ZIP, and the
files must not be bundled into general-purpose launchers or frameworks for use
across multiple applications.

Official terms: [General readme, section 1](https://dege.fw.hu/dgVoodoo2/ReadmeGeneral/)
